title_en: Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits
summary_zh: 用视觉模型建立 feature、circuit 与 intervention 的最初直觉。
summary_en: Build first-pass intuition for features, circuits, and interventions in a visual model.

paper_refs.title: Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits

summary_zh: 用最小 toy model 理解为什么神经元会混装多个语义。
summary_en: Use a minimal toy model to see why neurons can mix multiple semantics.

summary_zh: 通过教学版 sparse autoencoder 理解为什么 feature 视角比 neuron 视角更稳。
summary_en: Use a teaching-scale sparse autoencoder to see why a feature view can be cleaner than a neuron view.

paper_refs.title: Towards Monosemanticity: Decomposing Language Models With Dictionary Learning

title_en: Mapping the Mind of a Large Language Model
summary_zh: 浏览教学版 feature catalog，理解“发现大量特征”到底意味着什么。
summary_en: Browse a teaching-scale feature catalog to understand what it means to discover many reusable features.

paper_refs.title: Mapping the Mind of a Large Language Model

title_en: Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers
summary_zh: 把 feature 当成分类器输入，理解“读出”能力从哪里来。
summary_en: Treat features as classifier inputs and study where readout ability comes from.

paper_refs.title: Using dictionary learning features as classifiers

summary_zh: 扫描 steering 强度，观察 target gain、sweet spot 与 off-target cost 的平衡。
summary_en: Sweep steering strength to inspect target gain, sweet spots, and off-target costs.

title_en: Tracing the Thoughts of a Large Language Model
summary_zh: 用预计算 attribution graph 学会阅读一条局部计算路径。
summary_en: Use a precomputed attribution graph to read a local computation path.

paper_refs.title: Tracing the thoughts of a large language model

summary_zh: 查看 tracing artifact 与工作流拆解，理解工具层如何支撑分析。
summary_en: Inspect tracing artifacts and workflow stages to understand the tooling layer behind the analysis.

summary_zh: 通过 persona vector 的前后对比，理解 character trait 如何被表示成方向。
summary_en: Use before/after persona-vector comparisons to study character traits as directions.

paper_refs.title: Persona vectors: Monitoring and controlling character traits in language models

title_en: Signs of Introspection in Large Language Models
summary_zh: 用教学数据对比 self-report 与行为信号，讨论“内省迹象”到底意味着什么。
summary_en: Compare self-report and behavior signals in teaching data to discuss what 'signs of introspection' actually mean.

paper_refs.title: Signs of introspection in large language models

summary_zh: 把不同 assistant 风格投到同一条轴上，观察 character 稳定化问题。
summary_en: Project multiple assistant styles onto one axis and inspect the problem of stabilizing character.

paper_refs.title: The assistant axis: situating and stabilizing the character of large language models
